info.title: Notification Provider API
info.description: REST API for implementations of custom Notification Provider

tags.name: Connector Info
tags.description: Connector Information API. Each connector may have multiple functions represented by FunctionGroupCode. For each FunctionGroupCode there is a list of implemented end points. These endpoints must be according the specified interface, this is validated by the core. You can also implement helper end points that are used for callbacks and other relevant operations specific to implementation.

tags.name: Health check
tags.description: Connector Health check API. Connector returns own status and in some cases can return status of services on which it depends like database, HSM and so on.

tags.name: Connector Attributes
tags.description: Connector Attributes API. Provides information about supported Attributes of the connector. Attributes are specific to implementation and gives information about the data that can be exchanged and properly parsed by the connector. Part of this API is validation of the Attributes.

get.summary: List supported functions of the connector
get.description: Returns map of functional code and implemented end points

content.description: API Key content string

callbackMethod.description: HTTP method of the callback. This value is required for connector callbacks and optional only for callbacks defined on resource objects.

from.description: Name of the attribute whose value is to be used as value of path variable or request param or body field.It is optional and must be set only if value is not set.

attributeType.description: Type of the attribute. It is optional and must be set only if special behaviour is needed.

to.description: Name of the path variable or request param or body field which is to be used to assign value of attribute

targets.description: Set of targets for propagating value.

value.description: Static value to be propagated to targets. It is optional and is set only if the value is known at attribute creation time.

errorMessage.description: Error message to be displayed for wrong data

BooleanAttributeContentV2.description: Boolean attribute content to store true/false values

BooleanAttributeContentV3.description: Boolean attribute content to store true/false values

language.description: Definition of programming languages used for code

code.description: Block of the code in Base64. Formatting of the code is specified by variable language

CodeBlockAttributeContentV2.description: Codeblock attribute content to store encoded snippets of programming language code

CodeBlockAttributeContentV3.description: Codeblock attribute content to store encoded snippets of programming language code

uuid.description: Object identifier

CredentialAttributeContentV2.description: Credential attribute content carrying information about credential to use

label.description: Friendly name of the the Attribute

visible.description: Boolean determining if the Attribute is visible and can be displayed, otherwise it should be hidden to the user.

group.description: Group of the Attribute, used for the logical grouping of the Attribute

required.description: Boolean determining if the Attribute is required. If true, the Attribute must be provided.

readOnly.description: Boolean determining if the Attribute is read only. If true, the Attribute content cannot be changed.

list.description: Boolean determining if the Attribute contains list of values in the content

multiSelect.description: Boolean determining if the Attribute can have multiple values

protectionLevel.description: Protection level of the attribute content

resource.description: Resource of the attribute, relevant if the attribute has Resource content type

extensibleList.description: Boolean determining if a list Attribute can have values other than predefined options
